_comment: Merge this `hooks` block into your ~/.claude/settings.json (do NOT replace the whole file). Hooks are opt-in and user-local; the framework does not commit user settings. Adjust the absolute path below if your framework checkout lives elsewhere.
_install_notes: 2. If settings.json already has a `hooks` key, merge the arrays element-by-element (do not overwrite).

3. Replace ${FRAMEWORK_ROOT} with the absolute path to your framework checkout (e.g. /home/user/projects/em-development-framework). The placeholder is NOT auto-expanded by Claude Code — substitute manually before saving the settings file.
4. The PreToolUse Bash hook BLOCKS commits with --no-verify unless a one-shot marker /tmp/claude-bypass-marker-<session-id> exists (operator touches it manually before re-running).
5. Test pre-bash-guard manually: echo '{"tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"git commit --no-verify"},"session_id":"test"}' | python3 forge/tools/hooks/pre-bash-guard.py ; echo exit=$?
